message:
🔧 Fix: Force re-registration of release schedule

The release workflow schedule wasn't being picked up by GitHub's
scheduler. This trivial comment change should force GitHub to
re-register the cron schedule.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,10 +2,9 @@ name: Release
 
 on:
   schedule:
-    # Nightly at midnight Eastern Time (5 AM UTC during EST, 4 AM during EDT)
-    # Using 5 AM UTC to cover EST; during EDT it will run at 1 AM ET
+    # Nightly at 5 AM UTC (midnight Eastern during EST, 1 AM during EDT)
     - cron: '0 5 * * *'
-    # Weekly on Sunday at midnight Eastern Time
+    # Weekly on Sunday at 5 AM UTC
     - cron: '0 5 * * 0'
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
